title: OptiMized
description: A modpack that adds the OptiFine features for maximum speed.
body:
![Subscribe and share the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4be0e5f019f70ac6b249a5de7229f4863867f18.png)

# OptiMized Modpack – OptiFine Features, Supercharged ⚡
A modpack that brings you the best vanilla experience | but at four times the speed!

📦 **Features**

🔝 **High FPS boost** View the gallery for more.
🔜 **Other features coming soon**

**✨ And much more!**

**🖼️ Branding**
The OptiMized logo is property of Epici Gamer Inc. ©2025 Epici Gamer Inc. All rights reserved.


Want the look and feel of OptiFine without the performance hit? OptiMized is your go-to solution. Better than Simply Optimized and Adrenaline. Perfect for players who want shaders, zoom, and dynamic lighting — all running smoother than ever.
Enjoy the speed. Enjoy the style. Get OptiMized!

Did you like this modpack? Then I invite you to recommend it to your friends, relatives and acquaintances.

Visit our site: https://epicigamer.gitlab.io/optimized-site/.
